scope: Safe Drinking Water in Emergencies — fallback chain constraint test

librarySnapshot.note: CRITICAL: Zero guides in 'Safe Drinking Water in Emergencies' have any constraint metadata (responseRole, constraintTags, blockedByConstraints, or alternativeToGuideSlugs). The fallback chain is structurally broken — the mobile chat cannot route users past boiling to chemical treatment.

selectedWorkItem.reason: Primary action card in the fallback chain. Upgrading this guide with correct constraint metadata (blockedByConstraints: [no_boiling, no_fire, no_heat_source]) is the structural fix that makes the entire fallback chain functional. Secondary benefit: adds missing source URLs to 3 existing source references. This guide is the entry point — getting it right first anchors the entire cluster.

tier1_primary.note: THIS RUN: upgrade with constraint metadata

tier2_backup.note: FUTURE RUN: needs constraint annotation. Currently has no metadata.

tier3_supporting.note: FUTURE RUN: needs constraint annotation. Surfaces when neither boiling nor bleach is available.

tier3_supporting_b.note: FUTURE RUN: needed when user is unsure if treatment worked.

duplicateRisks.overlapDescription: Both are action_cards in 'Safe Drinking Water in Emergencies' covering household bleach water disinfection. purify-water-bleach has real source URLs and 4 steps; purifying-water-with-household-liquid-bleach has more detailed steps (6) but no URLs. They cover identical guidance.
duplicateRisks.recommendation: Merge into purify-water-bleach: port the better step detail from purifying-water-with-household-liquid-bleach, keep the real URLs from purify-water-bleach. Archive purifying-water-with-household-liquid-bleach. Do not assign responseRole:backup to BOTH.

clusterWideGap: All 10 guides in 'Safe Drinking Water in Emergencies' have null responseRole, null constraintTags, null blockedByConstraints. The fallback chain cannot function until at minimum purify-water-boiling and purify-water-bleach are annotated. This run addresses the primary (boiling). The backup (bleach) should be addressed in the next run after the duplicate is resolved.
